name: Outreach
shortDescription: Connect FlowRunner to [Outreach](https://www.outreach.io/) to automate sales engagement. The extension uses OAuth2 and covers prospects, accounts, sequence enrollment, tasks, calls, opportunities, templates, and snippets - plus real-time webhook triggers.

actions.name: Create Prospect
actions.description: Creates a new prospect (a person you sell to) in Outreach with their name, email, job title, and optional Account, owner, and tags. Use this to add a lead captured elsewhere into Outreach before enrolling them in a sequence.

actions.name: Get Prospect
actions.description: Retrieves a single prospect by ID, returning their full profile - name, emails, title, tags, and relationships. Use this to inspect a prospect before updating or enrolling them.

actions.name: List Prospects
actions.description: Returns a page of prospects, optionally filtered by an exact email match. Use this to browse prospects or to find one to feed into a later action; pass the returned cursor to page through results.

actions.name: Update Prospect
actions.description: Updates a prospect's name, title, or owner. Leave a field blank to keep its current value. Use this to enrich or correct a prospect's details.

actions.name: Delete Prospect
actions.description: Permanently deletes a prospect from Outreach. This cannot be undone. Use with care - it removes the person and their activity from your Outreach data.

actions.name: Add Prospect Tags
actions.description: Adds one or more tags to a prospect, merging them with the prospect's existing tags. Use this to label prospects (for example "vip" or "webinar-2026") for segmentation.

actions.name: Remove Prospect Tags
actions.description: Removes one or more tags from a prospect, keeping the rest. Use this to clean up labels - for example to take a prospect out of a tagged segment.

actions.name: Create Account
actions.description: Creates a new account (a company you sell to) in Outreach with its name, domain, industry, and owner. Use this to add a target company so prospects and opportunities can be linked to it.

actions.name: Get Account
actions.description: Retrieves a single account by ID, returning its company details. Use this to inspect an account before updating it or linking records to it.

actions.name: List Accounts
actions.description: Returns a page of accounts, optionally filtered by name. Use this to browse target companies or to find an account ID for a later action; pass the cursor to page through results.

actions.name: Update Account
actions.description: Updates an account's name, domain, or industry. Leave a field blank to keep its current value. Use this to correct or enrich company details.

actions.name: Delete Account
actions.description: Permanently deletes an account from Outreach. This cannot be undone. Prospects and opportunities linked to it are unlinked, not deleted.

actions.name: List Sequences
actions.description: Returns a page of sequences (the multi-step email/call cadences set up in Outreach), optionally filtered by name. Use this to find the sequence you want to enroll a prospect into.

actions.name: Get Sequence
actions.description: Retrieves a single sequence by ID, returning its name, status, and prospect count. Use this to inspect a sequence before enrolling prospects.

actions.name: List Sequence Steps
actions.description: Lists the steps that make up a sequence - their order, type (automatic email, call, task, etc.), and interval. Use this to inspect a cadence's structure.

actions.name: Add Prospect to Sequence
actions.description: Enrolls a prospect into a sequence so Outreach starts sending them the cadence's steps from the chosen mailbox. This is the core "start outreach to this person" action. Outreach requires a sending mailbox to enroll.

actions.name: Remove Prospect from Sequence
actions.description: Removes a prospect's enrollment from a sequence by deleting its sequence state, stopping further steps. Use this to unenroll someone who replied or opted out.

actions.name: List Sequence Enrollments
actions.description: Lists sequence states (prospect enrollments), optionally filtered by prospect or sequence. Use this to see which sequences a prospect is in, or who is enrolled in a sequence, and to get an enrollment ID to remove.

actions.name: Create Template
actions.description: Creates a reusable email template in Outreach with a name, subject, and HTML body. Use this to standardize messaging that reps and sequences can drop into emails.

actions.name: Get Template
actions.description: Retrieves a single email template by ID, returning its name, subject, and body. Use this to inspect a template before editing or reusing it.

actions.name: List Templates
actions.description: Returns a page of email templates. Use this to browse available templates or to find a template ID for a later action; pass the cursor to page through results.

actions.name: Update Template
actions.description: Updates an email template's name, subject, or HTML body. Leave a field blank to keep its current value. Use this to revise standardized messaging.

actions.name: Delete Template
actions.description: Permanently deletes an email template from Outreach. This cannot be undone. Sequences that referenced it will lose that template.

actions.name: Create Snippet
actions.description: Creates a reusable snippet (a saved block of content) in Outreach with a name and HTML body. Use this for boilerplate like a pricing blurb or legal footer that reps insert into emails.

actions.name: Get Snippet
actions.description: Retrieves a single snippet by ID, returning its name and body. Use this to inspect a snippet before editing or reusing it.

actions.name: List Snippets
actions.description: Returns a page of snippets. Use this to browse available snippets or to find a snippet ID for a later action; pass the cursor to page through results.

actions.name: Update Snippet
actions.description: Updates a snippet's name or HTML body. Leave a field blank to keep its current value. Use this to revise saved boilerplate content.

actions.name: Delete Snippet
actions.description: Permanently deletes a snippet from Outreach. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Task
actions.description: Creates a task in Outreach about a prospect - a to-do/action item, call, email, or in-person meeting, with an optional due date and owner. Use this to queue a rep's follow-up work.

actions.name: Get Task
actions.description: Retrieves a single task by ID, returning its type, state, due date, and note. Use this to inspect a task before updating or completing it.

actions.name: List Tasks
actions.description: Returns a page of tasks, optionally filtered by completion status and owner. Use this to find outstanding work for a rep or to locate a task ID for a later action.

actions.name: Update Task
actions.description: Updates a task's note, due date, or owner. Leave a field blank to keep its current value. To mark a task done, use Complete Task instead.

actions.name: Complete Task
actions.description: Marks a task complete by setting its state to "completed". Use this when the rep finishes the call, email, or to-do the task represents.

actions.name: Delete Task
actions.description: Permanently deletes a task from Outreach. This cannot be undone. Use this to remove a task that is no longer needed.

actions.name: Log Call
actions.description: Logs a call with a prospect in Outreach - its direction, outcome, note, and when it happened. Use this to record dial activity from an external dialer or after a manual call.

actions.name: Get Call
actions.description: Retrieves a single logged call by ID, returning its direction, outcome, and note. Use this to inspect a recorded call.

actions.name: List Calls
actions.description: Returns a page of logged calls, optionally filtered by prospect. Use this to review call history for a prospect or across the org; pass the cursor to page through results.

actions.name: Create Opportunity
actions.description: Creates an opportunity (a deal) in Outreach with a name, amount, account, stage, and owner. Use this to track a revenue opportunity tied to an account.

actions.name: Get Opportunity
actions.description: Retrieves a single opportunity by ID, returning its name, amount, and stage. Use this to inspect a deal before updating it.

actions.name: List Opportunities
actions.description: Returns a page of opportunities, optionally filtered by stage. Use this to review a pipeline or to find an opportunity ID for a later action; pass the cursor to page through results.

actions.name: Update Opportunity
actions.description: Updates an opportunity's name, stage, or amount. Leave a field blank to keep its current value. Use this to advance a deal through the pipeline or revise its value.

actions.name: Delete Opportunity
actions.description: Permanently deletes an opportunity from Outreach. This cannot be undone. Use this to remove a deal that was created in error.

actions.name: List Mailboxes
actions.description: Returns the mailboxes (sending email accounts) connected to Outreach. Use this to find the mailbox ID needed to enroll a prospect in a sequence.

actions.name: List Mailings
actions.description: Returns a page of mailings (outbound emails Outreach sent), optionally filtered by prospect, with open/click/reply counts. Use this to review email engagement for a prospect.

actions.name: List Users
actions.description: Returns the Outreach users (reps) in the org. Use this to find the user ID for an owner or assignee on a prospect, account, task, or opportunity.

actions.name: List Stages
actions.description: Returns the opportunity stages configured in Outreach (the pipeline steps). Use this to find the stage ID to set on an opportunity.

actions.name: List Tags
actions.description: Returns the distinct tags used across your Outreach data. Use this to discover existing labels before tagging prospects or accounts.

idealUseCases: Add captured leads as prospects, then enroll them in a sequence.
Keep accounts and prospects in sync with your CRM or data sources.
Tag and segment prospects automatically as they move through your funnel.
Queue follow-up tasks for reps and mark them complete from a flow.
Log calls from an external dialer into a prospect's timeline.
Create and update opportunities to keep the pipeline current.
Manage reusable email templates and snippets for consistent messaging.
React in real time to prospect, account, task, opportunity, call, and mailing events.
agentIdeas: On a new prospect, enrich it from another source, then enroll it in the right sequence and assign an owner.
When an inbound lead is captured, find-or-create its account and link the prospect before starting outreach.
On task completion, log the outcome elsewhere and queue the next follow-up task automatically.
When an opportunity changes stage, notify sales leadership and update a pipeline dashboard.
Nightly, list prospects filtered by email or tag and generate an engagement report from their mailings and calls.
